title: Zero to funded in 47 days. Here's the exact playbook.
description: Watch this ICT liquidity grab setup that led to massive profits. Learn how to identify these high-probability trades and accelerate your trading journey. Perfect example of why understanding market structure is crucial for consistent profits.
script: Zero to funded in 47 days. Here's the exact playbook. Most traders miss this liquidity setup. Price swept highs. Grabbed liquidity. Then reversed hard. Classic smart money move.
